title: Senior AI Engineer
company_focus:
UK financial services company offering credit cards and
consumer lending
description:
Mission Statement & Summary

We’re hiring a Senior AI Engineer to design and deliver AI
systems across the business.

This is a hands-on role focused on building production-grade
solutions using LLMs and agentic systems, embedding AI
directly into core business processes rather than building
isolated prototypes. You’ll take high-value problems and
turn them into scalable, reliable systems used in real
workflows, driving measurable business outcomes.

You’ll contribute significantly to technical direction,
architecture, and implementation, translating defined
business priorities into robust, production-ready systems.
You’ll make key technical contributions and work hands-on
alongside engineers to deliver solutions that are reusable,
scalable, and built for long-term impact.

How You’ll Contribute

· Design and implement AI systems end-to-end, contributing
to technical direction and architecture

· Build LLM-powered and agent-based solutions from concept
through to production

· Contribute to engineering standards, patterns, and
reusable components across use cases

· Make informed technical decisions on models, tooling,
infrastructure, and system design within agreed
architectural direction

· Ensure systems are robust, observable, and production-
ready (evaluation, monitoring, guardrails)

· Provide technical guidance and mentorship to engineers
contributing to AI initiatives

We're Looking For These Essential Skills

· Proven experience delivering production-grade AI systems
end-to-end

· Experience designing and implementing complex AI systems
across multiple use cases or domains

· Strong expertise in generative AI / LLMs, including
orchestration, prompting, and evaluation

· Experience building agentic or multi-step AI systems

· Strong software engineering fundamentals including APIs,
system design, and cloud-based architectures

· Ability to operate effectively in ambiguous or fast-moving
problem spaces

· Experience contributing to and influencing engineering
standards and practices across projects

It’s a plus if you also have these skills

· Experience contributing to AI platforms or reusable
frameworks and patterns

· Familiarity with LLMOps / MLOps and production evaluation
practices

· Experience embedding AI into core business processes or
enterprise systems

· Experience working in large-scale or regulated enterprise
environments

What's in it for you?

- 26 days holiday, rising to 30 with service
- A holiday buy scheme (up to 5 extra days)
- Double matched pension, with up to 14% from NewDay
- Generous annual performance bonuses
- Private medical insurance with Bupa, including mental health
  support and cancer care
- 26 weeks paid maternity, adoption and shared parental leave
- Free breakfast and lunch in the office every day, provided
  by our in-house chefs

…and more, which you can explore here!

At NewDay, we value all types of diversity. We’re an equal
opportunity employer and believe that our differences create
a vibrant, authentic working culture. We want all our
colleagues to feel able to bring their whole selves to work.
We don’t discriminate on the basis of protected
characteristics or identities. We make sure that every job
is crafted to be inclusive and that people with disabilities
or caring responsibilities can take part in the application
and interview process.

Tell us if you need accommodations: We’ll put reasonable
adjustments in place to support you.

We work with Textio to make our job design and hiring
inclusive.

Permanent
responsibilities: Design and implement AI systems end-to-end, contributing to technical direction and architecture
Build LLM-powered and agent-based solutions from concept through to production
Contribute to engineering standards, patterns, and reusable components across use cases
Make informed technical decisions on models, tooling, infrastructure, and system design
Ensure systems are robust, observable, and production-ready with evaluation, monitoring, and guardrails
Provide technical guidance and mentorship to engineers contributing to AI initiatives
Translate business priorities into robust, production-ready AI systems
use_cases: Embedding AI into core business processes at a financial services company
Agent-based multi-step AI systems for business problem solving
Production AI systems driving measurable business outcomes across the organization
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is directly focused on building, designing, and
delivering production-grade AI systems using LLMs and
agentic systems. The engineer will work hands-on building
LLM-powered and agent-based solutions from concept to
production, making it a clear ai-first role.
